files.name: imagegen-frontend-mobile
files.description: Elite mobile app image-generation skill for creating premium, app-native screen concepts and flows. iOS/Android/cross-platform. Generates images only, no code.
sections: Core Directive: Premium Mobile App Image Direction
Active Baseline Configuration (18 knobs: design variance, density, art direction, etc.)
Do Not Crop Old Images Rule
Safe Area and System Region Rule
Mobile Anti-AI-Tells Rule (visual, layout, copy, UI clutter tells)
Style Variation Engine (theme, typography, structure, art direction, texture, palette, components, assets, motion)
Category-Specific Bias (fintech, health/fitness, productivity, social, commerce, wellness)

files.name: imagegen-frontend-web
files.description: Elite frontend image-direction skill for generating premium, conversion-aware website design references. One horizontal image per section. Awwwards-level art direction.
sections: Hard Output Rule (one horizontal image per section)
Core Directive: Awwwards-Level Image Art Direction
Brief-to-Direction Mapping (minimalist, editorial, cinematic, SaaS, agency, e-commerce)

The Combinatorial Variation Engine (theme, background, typography, hero architecture, section system, components, motion, composition anchor, background mode, CTA, hero scale, narrative spine, second-read moment)
Anti-AI-Slop Rules (layout, visual, typography, content, density, carousel, KPI)

files.name: industrial-brutalist-ui
files.description: Raw mechanical interfaces fusing Swiss typographic print with military terminal aesthetics. Rigid grids, extreme type scale contrast, utilitarian color, analog degradation effects.
sections: Visual Archetypes (Swiss Industrial Print, Tactical Telemetry & CRT Terminal)
Textural and Post-Processing Effects (halftone, CRT scanlines, mechanical noise)

files.name: minimalist-ui
files.description: Clean editorial-style interfaces. Warm monochrome palette, typographic contrast, flat bento grids, muted pastels. No gradients, no heavy shadows.
sections: Absolute Negative Constraints (banned elements: font, icons, shadows, gradients, emoji, cliches)
Typographic Architecture (primary sans, editorial serif, monospace)
Component Specifications (bento grids, CTAs, tags, accordions, keystrokes, OS window chrome)

files.name: redesign-existing-projects
files.description: Upgrades existing websites and apps to premium quality. Audits current design, identifies generic AI patterns, and applies high-end design standards without breaking functionality.
sections: Design Audit by category: Typography, Color and Surfaces, Layout, Interactivity and States, Content, Component Patterns, Iconography, Code Quality, Strategic Omissions
Upgrade Techniques (typography, layout, motion, surface upgrades)
Fix Priority (font swap → color cleanup → states → layout → components → states → typography polish)

files.name: shape
files.description: Wireframe-first pass — ASCII layout + state list + content inventory + question list before any code. Sub-skill of ui-craft for low-fi thinking before building.
sections: Step 4: State list (idle, loading, empty, error, partial, conflict, offline, success)

files.name: stitch-design-taste
files.description: Semantic Design System Skill for Google Stitch. Generates agent-friendly DESIGN.md files with premium, anti-generic UI standards.
sections: Analysis & Synthesis Instructions (atmosphere, color palette, typography rules, hero section, components, layout, responsive, motion, anti-patterns)

files.name: tokens
files.description: Audit or establish the project's 3-layer token spine (primitive → semantic → component). Sub-skill of ui-craft for design token systems.
sections: Step 3: Audit (3-layer coverage, 7-category coverage, intentional dark mode, naming discipline, no arbitrary values)
Step 4: Establish (minimal spine: primitives, semantics, component tokens)

files.name: ui-craft
files.description: Core UI design skill — anti-slop rules, discovery phase, craft tests, layout/typography/color/motion guidance. The parent skill for all ui-craft-* sub-skills.
sections: Discovery Phase (project analysis, quick ask, apply decisions)
Core Rules (Anti-Slop Test, Craft Test, When Rules Break, Animation Decision Ladder, Design Rules)

files.name: ui-craft-dense-dashboard
files.description: Dense dashboard / admin / Bloomberg / Retool / data-heavy internal tools. CRAFT=7, MOTION=3, DENSITY=9. IBM Plex + mono numbers, semantic palette, 4/8px grid.
sections: Style anchors (tabular-nums, sparklines, keyboard shortcuts, dense chrome)
Style-specific overrides: Typography, Color, Spacing & Layout, Data Display, Chrome & Navigation, Motion

files.name: ui-craft-editorial
files.description: Editorial / magazine / long-form / Medium / Substack / content-heavy UIs. CRAFT=9, MOTION=4, DENSITY=3. Serif display + humanist body, wide reading column, OpenType.
sections: Style anchors (serif display, baseline grid, 65ch reading column, OpenType features, warm canvas)
Style-specific overrides: Typography, Color, Spacing & Layout, Motion, Content Components

files.name: ui-craft-minimal
files.description: Minimal / clean / Linear / Notion / Vercel / whitespace-heavy UIs. CRAFT=8, MOTION=3, DENSITY=2. Monochrome + one accent, hairline borders, no shadows.
sections: Style anchors (near-black on near-white, Inter/Geist, generous padding, hairline borders)
Style-specific overrides: Typography, Color, Spacing & Layout, Borders & Elevation, Motion, Composition
